calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Dec-05-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter Eric L. Throne. Petitioner, Dawn Marie Weinschrrott was sworn and examined. Good cause appearing, the Court grants Decree changing name to Dawn Marie Weinschrott Revilla. Decree signed in open court.
